title: elaphoglossum eriopus
intro: Elaphoglossum eriopus is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly known as the 'hair fern'. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum eriopus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and act as an antioxidant. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is often used in herbal remedies to support immune function and overall well-being.
